nasb.text: And the wolf will dwell with the lamb, And the leopard will lie down with the young goat, And the calf and the young lion and the fatling together; And a little boy will lead them.

esv.text: The wolf shall dwell with the lamb, and the leopard shall lie down with the young goat, and the calf and the lion and the fattened calf together; and a little child shall lead them.

cnv.text: 豺狼必與綿羊羔同住， 豹子要與山羊羔同臥， 牛犢、幼獅和肥畜必同群； 小孩子要牽引牠們。

ccb.text: 那时，豺狼和绵羊羔同住， 豹子和山羊羔同卧， 牛犊和狮子同群， 小孩子可以照看它们。

csbs.text: 狼与小绵羊同住， 豹与小山羊同卧， 牛犊、少壮狮子和肥畜同群； 小孩子要牵引它们。
